medusaFix: A real View_PreMatch_CharSelect Medusa click now remembers explicit selection and submits CmdTrySelectCharacter retries without global auto-select; longer retries cover late PlayerPreMatch creation.
queueFix: AMP cold Wine/Unity prewarm default is 360s before app ready; match bootstrap timeout 300s, managed status timeout 180s, stall grace 210s, stall idle 90s to avoid failed first queue attempts during cold MelonLoader startup.
